issues.message: Stale auto.lock from PID 10668 (started 2026-03-23T06:49:57.225Z, was executing execute-task M001/S03/T02) — process is no longer running

Milestone M002 title contains em/en dash (— or –), which conflict with GSD state document delimiters. Rename the milestone to remove these characters to prevent state corruption.
